query:
SELECT planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost, AVG(monthlyCost) as avgCost, MIN(monthlyCost) as minCost, MAX(monthlyCost) as maxCost
FROM services
WHERE planName LIKE '%Executive%'
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost, AVG(monthlyCost) as avgCost, MIN(monthlyCost) as minCost, MAX(monthlyCost) as maxCost
FROM services
WHERE planName LIKE '%Executive%'
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
